title: gleichenia squamosa
intro: Gleichenia squamosa, also known as the scaly tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. It is native to Australia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gleichenia squamosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, with the leaves and rhizome being used to make herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
